description_long: This is a cordless electric drill with a robust, ergonomic design, primarily colored in yellow and black. The drill features a pistol-grip handle with a textured surface for secure handling, and a large rectangular battery pack at the base, which provides stability when set down. The front section includes a black, ribbed chuck for holding drill bits, and a visible metallic drill bit is currently attached. The body has several ventilation slots on the sides and top, as well as a visible trigger button on the handle. There are also molded details and a few small control dials or switches near the chuck for adjusting torque or speed. The overall construction suggests a durable plastic exterior with internal metal components for strength and function.
description: A yellow and black cordless electric drill with a pistol grip, visible trigger, battery pack, and attached metallic drill bit. The body features ventilation slots and molded details for grip and control.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the handle, trigger, battery pack, ventilation slots, and attached drill bit.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the handle, battery pack, and the rear ventilation slots.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile, with similar features as view 0 but from the left side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the metallic drill bit, the circular chuck, and the top of the battery pack.
